title: Specify source-adapter Evidence
description: Validates a single source-adapter `Evidence` document per RFC-25 ┬¦Source adapter contract ŌĆö the per-source result of `extract`, persisted under `.specify/slices/<slice>/evidence/<source-key>.yaml`. Top-level fields: `source` (kebab-case source key), `adapter` (kebab-case adapter id), `authority` (closed enum `intent | documentation | behaviour`), `candidate` (kebab-case candidate id from `discovery.md`), `claims[]`, and (RFC-27 ┬¦D2) the optional `authority-overrides` map keyed by claim kind whose values resolve a per-kind authority class for this Evidence document. Each claim carries a closed `kind` from {intent, requirement, criterion, decision, section, diagram, contract, example, excerpt, type, call, region, container, leaf} ŌĆö `region`/`container`/`leaf` are the spatial kinds co-introduced with the `screenshots` source adapter (RFC-25 ┬¦W2.4); `example` (RFC-27 ┬¦D1) is the runtime capture kind emitted by the `captures` source adapter and carries open per-kind body fields `replay-digest` (`sha256:<hex>`), `input`, and `output`. `claim-id` is required on `requirement`, `criterion`, and `example` kinds and optional on others; `path` matches the grammar `<path>` | `<path>#L<n>` | `<path>#L<start>-L<end>`. Per-kind body fields (`statement`, `criterion`, `decision`, `replay-digest`, `input`, `output`, etc.) are intentionally open.

source.description: Source key (matches a top-level `plan.yaml.sources.<key>` binding) the Evidence was extracted from.

authority.description: Document-level authority class for this Evidence per RFC-25 ┬¦Authority hierarchy. Per-kind overrides land in `authority-overrides`.

candidate.description: Candidate id (matches a `## Candidate inventory` block in `discovery.md`) the Evidence is bound to.

claims.description: Per-claim extraction records. Empty `claims: []` is valid; failure is signalled by not writing the Evidence file at all.

authority-overrides.description: RFC-27 ┬¦D2 ŌĆö optional per-(Evidence, claim-kind) authority overrides. Keys are the closed claim-kind enum; values are the closed authority-class enum. Synthesis consults this map first, then falls back to the document-level `authority:` field, then to the RFC-25 default ordering. Both keys and values are closed enums; new kinds or classes require an RFC update.

authorityClass.description: Closed authority class per RFC-25 ┬¦Authority hierarchy. New classes require an RFC update.

claimKind.description: Closed claim-kind enum. New kinds require an RFC update. `example` (RFC-27 ┬¦D1) is the runtime capture kind emitted by `captures` and carries open `replay-digest` / `input` / `output` body fields.

claim-id.description: Stable claim identifier. Required when `kind` is `requirement`, `criterion`, or `example`; optional on other kinds.
